delay_description: Unfurnished property — setup capital must be committed before going live

typical_timeline.notes: Based on 2 timeline signals observed: setup quote needed, 2 weeks to ready

how_to_handle_in_meeting.acknowledge_phrase: Totally — you want to understand the setup cost before you commit to anything.
how_to_handle_in_meeting.timeline_question: Do you have a budget in mind for furnishing, and is that something you could move on in the next few months?
how_to_handle_in_meeting.reframe_approach: Turn the setup cost into a return calculation: 'If setup is £5k and you earn £15k net in year one, payback is 4 months.' Show them it's an investment, not a cost.
how_to_handle_in_meeting.how_to_keep_engaged: Send the setup quote within 24 hours. 'Once you have the number in front of you, you can decide whether the timeline works.'
how_to_handle_in_meeting.what_to_write_to_monday: Send furnishing quote. Note budget sensitivity in Call Brief. Set follow-up for 2 weeks post-quote.

conversion_after_delay.drop_off_reason: Insufficient data to determine — fewer than 10 delay entries per type
conversion_after_delay.note: First run — conversion-after-delay rates will improve with more data over time

do_not_attempt_offer_because: Lead doesn't yet know what the upfront cost is. Offering before they have the quote is premature — they can't decide without the full picture.
